rtr-edge-01>show inventory

PID: ASR1000-ESP100  , VID: V03 , SN: JJJ12345678

rtr-edge-01>show version

ROM: IOS-XE ROMMON
rtr-edge-01 uptime is 1 year, 24 weeks, 3 days, 12 hours, 8 minutes
System image file is "bootflash:asr1000rpx86-universalk9.16.03.07.SPA.bin"

connected       0           24          0           1920        7104

        transform: esp-aes esp-sha256-hmac ,
     outbound esp sas:

        transform: esp-aes esp-sha256-hmac ,
